narrative:
South Euclid-Lyndhurst City Sd city school district has 25,922 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 30.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +12.7% D−R vs +37.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
